name: Pasta Primavera (Campbells)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Tomato soup
1 large Carrot, cut into matchstick-thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, combine the soup, milk, cheese, garlic powder, and pepper; add broccoli and carrot. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Add spaghetti. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
